queries.question: What sci-fi films were filmed in New Zealand and what fantasy films were filmed in the same location?
queries.sql:
SELECT Films.title 
FROM Genres JOIN Films ON Genres.id = Films.genreId
WHERE (Genres.genreName = "Sci-Fi" OR Genres.genreName = "Fantasy") AND Films.filmingLocation = "New Zealand"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?films a :Films .
  ?films p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?genres p:genreName ?genrename_w .
  ?genres p:genreName ?genrename_w2 .
  ?films p:filmingLocation ?filminglocation_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?genrename_w) = "Sci-Fi" || STR(?genrename_w2) = "Fantasy")) && STR(?filminglocation_w) = "New Zealand"))
}

queries.question: Show sci-fi films and fantasy films filmed in New Zealand.
queries.sql:
SELECT Films.title 
FROM Genres JOIN Films ON Genres.id = Films.genreId
WHERE Genres.genreName = "Sci-Fi" OR Genres.genreName = "Fantasy" AND Films.filmingLocation = "New Zealand"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?films a :Films .
  ?films p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?genres p:genreName ?genrename_w .
  ?genres p:genreName ?genrename_w2 .
  ?films p:filmingLocation ?filminglocation_w .
  FILTER((STR(?genrename_w) = "Sci-Fi" || (STR(?genrename_w2) = "Fantasy" && STR(?filminglocation_w) = "New Zealand")))
}
